report.summary: Stable hold cycle — no new commits today; 2 new learn guides built earlier (GPU compute + DeFi insurance) await publishing; 42 TS errors in 2 non-critical files; all 6 API routes healthy with proper caching.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: TypeScript check: 42 errors across 2 files only — structured-data.examples.ts (40 errors, non-production examples file) and learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (2 JSX syntax errors with unescaped '>')
Page audit: 103 published slugs still missing page.tsx files — these routes will 404 if hit in production; needs scaffolding or removal from published-pages.ts
No new commits since last cycle (cb65a9d, Day 42 publish) — no regressions introduced
Build cannot be verified locally (sandbox OOM) but Vercel builds with 8GB heap + ignoreBuildErrors:true compensates
2 new pages scaffolded today (GPU compute guide + DeFi insurance guide) — both in PUBLISH_QUEUE, not yet promoted

sections.title: Data Pipeline
items: All 6 core API routes present and properly configured: /api/prices (60s), /api/trending (300s), /api/fear-greed (600s), /api/market-metrics (60s), /api/market-dominance (300s), /api/defi-yields (300s)
Cache-Control + stale-while-revalidate headers set on all 6 routes
X-Cache-Source headers: present on prices and market-dominance; missing on trending, fear-greed; market-metrics uses non-standard X-Cache header — minor observability gap
/api/defi-yields is highest-risk route: no in-memory cache (delegates to lib), no fallback data — will error if DefiLlama is down
Rate limiting absent on all 6 core data routes — only applied to /api/health and /api/cache-stats
CoinGecko and DefiLlama free-tier integrations stable, no rate limit incidents reported

sections.title: DevOps
items: Vercel project active: cryptodegen (prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75), standalone output mode
next.config.ts tuned: staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, workerThreads=false, 8GB heap, ignoreBuildErrors=true, trailingSlash=true
Security headers active in both next.config.ts and middleware: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, X-DNS-Prefetch-Control
Last deploy: cb65a9d (Day 42 publish) — no new deployments needed this cycle
No error spikes or performance regressions detected — stable state
Live site health cannot be verified from sandbox — recommend manual spot-check

sections.title: Project Manager
items: This cycle shipped: 0 new commits (stable hold); earlier today 2 learn guides were built and queued (GPU compute networks, DeFi insurance)
Published pages: ~560 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES | PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 pages waiting (gpu-compute, defi-insurance)
Total pages built: ~1,076 page.tsx files in src/app — large surplus of built-but-unpublished content
Sprint 59 (App Store v2 — 176 dApps) continues stable after build fix cycle
Carry-over from last cycle: fix 2 TS errors in crypto-index-funds-guide, add rate limiting to core API routes, scaffold or remove 103 orphan published slugs

sections.title: Blockers for Jefe
items: MEDIUM: 103 published slugs have no page.tsx — these will 404 in production. Either scaffold pages or clean up published-pages.ts
LOW: /api/defi-yields has no fallback data — single point of failure if DefiLlama goes down
LOW: Core API routes lack rate limiting — no incidents yet but vulnerable to abuse
LOW: crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 has 2 JSX syntax errors — quick fix needed before publish
